instanceSettings.errorDisableMany: Failed to disable {{failed}} of {{total}} timer heartbeats. First error: {{detail}}
instanceSettings.title: Scheduler Heartbeats
instanceSettings.subtitle: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.
instanceSettings.confirmDisableAllOne: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled agent?
instanceSettings.confirmDisableAllMany: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled agents?
instanceSettings.emptyState: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.

instanceGeneralSettings.heading: General
instanceGeneralSettings.description: Configure instance-wide defaults that affect how operator-visible logs are displayed.
instanceGeneralSettings.censorDescription: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.

deployment.heading: Deployment and auth
deployment.localTrusted: Local trusted mode is optimized for a local operator. Browser requests run as local board context and no sign-in is required.
deployment.publicAuth: Authenticated public mode requires sign-in for board access and is intended for public URLs.
deployment.privateAuth: Authenticated private mode requires sign-in and is intended for LAN, VPN, or other private-network deployments.

shortcuts.heading: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default.

backup.heading: Backup retention
backup.description: Configure how long to keep automatic database backups at each tier. Daily backups are kept in full, then thinned to one per week and one per month. Backups are compressed with gzip.

feedback.heading: AI feedback sharing
feedback.description: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Paperclip Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
feedback.prompt: No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.
feedback.notAllowedDescription: Keep voted AI outputs local only.
feedback.devHint: To retest the first-use prompt in local dev, remove the feedbackDataSharingPreference key from the instance_settings.general JSON row for this instance, or set it back to "prompt". Unset and "prompt" both mean no default has been chosen yet.

signOut.heading: Sign out
signOut.description: Sign out of this Paperclip instance. You will be redirected to the login page.

instanceExperimental.title: Experimental
instanceExperimental.description: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.
instanceExperimental.isolatedWorkspacesDescription: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.
instanceExperimental.autoRestartDescription: In `pnpm dev:once`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.
